final:
module RefModule (
    input wire T,
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    output reg Q
);
  wire _tap_T = T & {1{1'b1}};

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            Q <= 0;
        end else if (T) begin
            Q <= ~Q; // toggle Q
        end
    end
endmodule
